# alex@jndl.dev

> Personal portfolio and blog of Alexander Jandl.

Alexander Jandl is an infrastructure security engineer based in Bratislava, Slovakia. This site is a retro BSOD-themed portfolio showcasing projects and blog posts on infrastructure, security, automation, and homelab builds.

## Skills

Bash, Python, Go, AWS, Azure, Linux, Docker, Terraform, Kubernetes, networking, penetration testing.

## Links

- Homepage: https://jndl.dev
- Blog: https://jndl.dev/blog
- GitHub: https://github.com/xdsai
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/jndl
